item.title: Trailer Repair Time on Larson Farms
item.description: Taking on a worn trailer and gets it ready for work again with practical repairs and steady farm maintenance.

media:content.media:title: Trailer Repair Time on Larson Farms
media:content.media:description: Taking on a worn trailer and gets it ready for work again with practical repairs and steady farm maintenance.

item.title: A Tough Day on the Farm
item.description: A hard setback in the field, showing the realities of farm work and the patience it takes to keep it going.

media:content.media:title: A Tough Day on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A hard setback in the field, showing the realities of farm work and the patience it takes to keep it going.

item.title: Dry Wall Going In the Easy Way
item.description: Dry wall goes in the easy way, showing practical work and steady progress on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Dry Wall Going In the Easy Way
media:content.media:description: Dry wall goes in the easy way, showing practical work and steady progress on the farm.

item.title: Cutting Open Soybeans to Check the Crop
item.description: Larson cuts open soybeans to inspect the crop and see what’s inside. A simple field check that helps guide harvest decisions.

media:content.media:title: Cutting Open Soybeans to Check the Crop
media:content.media:description: Larson cuts open soybeans to inspect the crop and see what’s inside. A simple field check that helps guide harvest decisions.

item.title: Night Farming Runs Faster on the Farm
item.description: Larson shows why night field work can move faster, with steady equipment use and a practical look at getting farm jobs done after dark.

media:content.media:title: Night Farming Runs Faster on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Larson shows why night field work can move faster, with steady equipment use and a practical look at getting farm jobs done after dark.

item.title: 5 Inches of Rain Makes Field Work Tough
item.description: Heavy rain left the fields messy and slowed farm work. Larson keeps at it, dealing with wet ground and the cleanup that comes with it.

media:content.media:title: 5 Inches of Rain Makes Field Work Tough
media:content.media:description: Heavy rain left the fields messy and slowed farm work. Larson keeps at it, dealing with wet ground and the cleanup that comes with it.

item.title: Big Farm Equipment Surprises the Crew
item.description: A look at a massive piece of farm equipment that caught the crew off guard. Real farm work often means handling big machines and figuring out the job as it comes...

media:content.media:title: Big Farm Equipment Surprises the Crew
media:content.media:description: A look at a massive piece of farm equipment that caught the crew off guard. Real farm work often means handling big machines and figuring out the job as it comes...

item.title: Speech-to-Text vs Farmer Talk on the Farm
item.description: A look at speech-to-text and farmer talk during everyday farm work. Simple, practical and surprisingly accurate in the field.

media:content.media:title: Speech-to-Text vs Farmer Talk on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A look at speech-to-text and farmer talk during everyday farm work. Simple, practical and surprisingly accurate in the field.

item.title: Winter Farm Jobs Take More Time
item.description: Winter farm work slows down and every task takes longer, from equipment use to daily chores. Larson keeps moving through the cold conditions.

media:content.media:title: Winter Farm Jobs Take More Time
media:content.media:description: Winter farm work slows down and every task takes longer, from equipment use to daily chores. Larson keeps moving through the cold conditions.

item.title: Searching the Fields for a Solution
item.description: Larson keeps working through the field and checking equipment, looking for what’s missing and staying focused on the job at hand.

media:content.media:title: Searching the Fields for a Solution
media:content.media:description: Larson keeps working through the field and checking equipment, looking for what’s missing and staying focused on the job at hand.
